description: Learn about staking, savings, and DeFi in this Binance webinar. The discussion covers various blockchain technologies, including Bitcoin and Ethereum, and explores Binance's savings products.
topic_summary: The webinar discusses staking, savings, and DeFi, highlighting the challenges of proof of work and the benefits of Binance savings products. Key speakers include Brian, Gustavus Ontario, and others, with insights on crypto compliance and security [t=39:12].
